meta.privacyNote: Public page: no PNR, airline confirmation code, ticket number, passport, date of birth, or payment details.
meta.status: Known confirmed flight legs are included. Hong Kong to United States return flight details are pending confirmation.

itineraries.title: SFO to Buenos Aires via Mexico City
itineraries.checkInHint: Use last name Ouyang plus reservation code or ticket number from the private Chase Travel email.
itineraries.baggageNote: Same Aeromexico itinerary. At SFO, verify the checked-bag tag says EZE. If it is tagged to EZE, do not collect checked baggage during the MEX layover.
itineraries.borderNote: Leaving MEX airport during the layover requires clearing Mexico immigration. Carry passport, valid U.S. visa or other Mexico-accepted entry document, and onward itinerary.

legs.terminalHint: Confirm SFO/MEX terminals on boarding pass; Aeromexico commonly uses MEX Terminal 2.

itineraries.title: Buenos Aires to Rio de Janeiro
itineraries.checkInHint: Use the private GOL booking information from email/app. Check in near the airline's online check-in window.
itineraries.baggageNote: This is a city-to-city flight into Rio. Collect checked baggage at GIG before going to the hotel.

legs.terminalHint: Arrives at GIG Terminal 2 per itinerary notes.

itineraries.title: Rio de Janeiro to Sao Paulo
itineraries.checkInHint: Use the private GOL booking information from email/app.
itineraries.baggageNote: Domestic Brazil segment. Collect checked baggage at CGH after arrival.

legs.terminalHint: Departs GIG Terminal 2 per itinerary notes.

itineraries.title: Sao Paulo to Shanghai via Addis Ababa
itineraries.checkInHint: Use the private Ethiopian/Trip.com booking information from email/app.
itineraries.baggageNote: Trip.com itinerary says no need to collect and re-check baggage during the ADD transfer. Confirm the checked-bag tag says PVG at GRU.

legs.terminalHint: Departs GRU Terminal 3 and arrives ADD Terminal 2 per itinerary notes.
Departs ADD Terminal 2 and arrives PVG Terminal 2 per itinerary notes.

itineraries.title: Hong Kong to United States
itineraries.checkInHint: No confirmed ticket details found in local records yet. Add airline, flight number, and departure time after Steve sends the final China plan or ticket.
itineraries.baggageNote: Keep U.S. entry documents and one clean flight outfit in carry-on.
